description: Unique identifier for the advertising campaign within Facebook Ads. Joins to basic_campaign_actions.campaign_id.
Date of the performance metrics (YYYY-MM-DD). Primary time dimension for filtering and trend analysis.
The Facebook Ad Account ID associated with this campaign.
Total number of times the campaign's ads were shown on screens.
Number of clicks on links that lead to external destinations from ads within the campaign.
Total number of unique users who saw at least one ad from this campaign.
Average cost for each link click within the campaign.
Average cost per overall click (may include different types of clicks, not just links).
Cost per 1,000 impressions across all ads within the campaign.
Percentage of impressions that resulted in a click (clicks/impressions * 100).
Average number of times a unique user saw any ad from the campaign.
Total amount spent on this campaign for the reported date.
Display name of the campaign as defined by the advertiser.
Inline link click-through rate percentage, indicating performance of external call-to-actions.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row. Internal metadata, never expose to users.
